'''''Cielo''''' was a [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]] escorted by the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] [[Wasp (CR90 corvette)|''Wasp'']]. It was part of an [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] convoy after [[Operation Grain Snatch]] still looking for a site for a new base, but was endangered by ''[[Red Wind]]''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: Imperial Pursuit]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-03-XX -->''[[X-Wing Collector's CD-ROM: The Official Strategy Guide]]''
